html:
Exclusive to:  

Monster Tartare is a Warly-specific Food Item cooked in the Portable Crock Pot by adding 2 Monster Foods, 1 Vegetables, and 1 Eggs. It takes 40 seconds to cook.

Unlike Monster Lasagna, Monster Tartare restores the player's Health and Sanity (3 and 10 ), instead of damaging them (-20 and -20 ).

Prerequisites

  • Requires:
  • Requires:
  • Requires:

Recipe

×2

Examples

×2

Trivia

  • Monster Tartare was introduced to Don't Starve Together in the Warly Character Update.
  • Steak Tartare is raw or lightly seared minced meat served with raw onions and a raw egg yolk.

–Wormwood
“I'd just as soon launch this out of the Pew-matic.”
–Wheeler
“I'm all for getting my daily iron but this goes too far.”
–Winona
“Monster flesh that's very fresh.”
–Wortox
“Fancy name not make it better, flort.”
–Wurt
“Fancy and gross overlaps a lot.”
–Walter
“Just smelling it shaved a few years off my life.”
–Wanda

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Monster Tartare là một Thức Ăn đặc trưng của Warly được nấu trong Nồi Hầm Di Động bằng cách thêm 2 Thức Ăn Quái, 1 Rau và 1 Trứng. Phải mất 40 giây để nấu ăn.

'''Monster Tartare''' is a [[Warly]]-specific [[Food]] [[Item]] cooked in the [[Portable Crock Pot]] by adding 2 [[Monster Food]]s, 1 [[Vegetables]], and 1 [[Eggs]]. It takes 40 seconds to cook. 

Unlike [[Monster Lasagna]], Monster Tartare restores the player's [[Health]] and [[Sanity]] (3 {{Hp}} and 10 {{Sanity}}), instead of damaging them (-20 {{Hp}} and -20 {{Sanity}}).
== Prerequisites ==
* Requires: [[File:Monster Food Crock Pot.png|link=Monster Foods]]
* Requires: [[File:Eggs Crock Pot.png|link=Eggs]]
* Requires: [[File:Crock Pot Vegetables (no Mandrake).png|link=Vegetables]]

== [[File:Cookbook.png|32px]] Recipe ==
{{Recipe
|item1 = Monster Foods
|count1 = 2
|item2 = Vegetables
|item3 = Eggs
|tool = Portable Crock Pot
|result = Monster Tartare}}

==Examples==
{{Recipe
|item1 = Monster Meat
|item2 = Dried Jellyfish
|item3 = Cooked Sweet Potato
|item4 = Egg
|tool = Portable Crock Pot
|result = Monster Tartare}}
{{Recipe
|item1 = Dead Jellyfish
|count1 = 2
|item3 = Red Cap
|item4 = Egg
|tool = Portable Crock Pot
|result = Monster Tartare}}

=={{Pic32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==
* Monster Tartare was introduced to ''Don't Starve Together'' in the [[Don't Starve Together/Version History#|Warly Character Update]].
* [[Wikipedia:Steak_tartare|Steak Tartare]] is raw or lightly seared minced meat served with raw onions and a raw egg yolk.
